mood.description: Mood indicator for the journal entry. Use Sad for negative reactions, problems, or escalations. Use Neutral for factual observations or open-ended notes. Use Happy for positive feedback, wins, or progress. If not provided, the current mood is preserved.

reminder.description: Reminder date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Provide a date string to set or update the reminder. Set to null to clear an existing reminder. If not provided (omitted from request), the current reminder is preserved.

id.description: Unique identifier for the project upload record (UUID format)

projectId.description: UUID of the project this upload belongs to. Determines which project the file is associated with.

fileId.description: UUID of the underlying file in workspace storage. This references the file uploaded via POST /workspace/upload.

description.description: Free text description for classifying the upload content. Can be null if no description was provided.

categoryId.description: UUID of the category assigned to this upload for thematic organization. Can be null if no category is assigned.

fileName.description: Original filename of the uploaded file, as stored in the File relation. This is the name the file had when uploaded.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file indicating its format (e.g., application/pdf, image/png, text/plain). Retrieved from the File relation.

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes. Use this to display file sizes in a human-readable format (e.g., KB, MB).

userId.description: UUID of the user who created this upload. This identifies who uploaded or last updated the file.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp indicating when the upload record was created. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp indicating when the upload record was last updated. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ. This changes whenever any field of the upload is modified.

projectId.description: The UUID of the project to attach this upload to. The project must exist in the workspace and the user must have access to it. This determines which project the file will be associated with.

fileId.description: The UUID of the file obtained from the POST /workspace/upload endpoint. You must upload the file first using that endpoint to receive a fileId, then use that ID here. The file must exist in the workspace and belong to the same workspace.

description.description: Optional free text description for classifying and identifying the upload content. Use clear, descriptive text like "Signed contract 10/28/2025", "Kickoff protocol", or "Technical specification v2". This helps users quickly understand what the file contains without opening it.

categoryId.description: Optional UUID of a category for organizing uploads thematically (e.g., Contract, Offer, Documentation, Dossier). Categories help with filtering, sorting, and finding files. The category must exist in the workspace. Set to null to create an upload without a category. Categories can be created dynamically during upload if they do not exist yet.

projectId.description: Change which project this upload belongs to. Provide the UUID of the target project. The project must exist in the workspace and the user must have access to it. If not provided, the upload remains associated with its current project.

description.description: Update the description text for the upload. Provide a new description string, or set to null to clear the description. If not provided, the description remains unchanged.

categoryId.description: Change the category assignment for the upload. Provide the UUID of a category, or set to null to remove the category. The category must exist in the workspace if provided. If not provided, the category remains unchanged.

id.description: Project UUID

projectDocumentEnableToc.description: Enable table of contents for project documents. When true, automatically generated documents include a table of contents. When false, table of contents is disabled for this project. When null, the project inherits the organization/workspace default. This setting is especially helpful for long documents and makes them easier to navigate.

projectDocumentTitlePage.description: Enable title page for project documents. When true, generated documents include a title page. When false, title page is disabled for this project. When null, the project inherits the organization/workspace default.

projectDocumentDefaultContactUserId.description: Default contact person user ID for project documents. This person is automatically set as the contact when creating new documents for this project. Useful for recurring offer processes, automated preambles, and binding customer-side addressing. When null, the project inherits the organization default (if set) or no default contact is used. Must be a valid user UUID from the workspace.

projectDocumentHeadingStyle.description: Heading style for project documents. Controls the numbering and formatting of headings in generated documents. This feature keeps document outlines consistent, especially in contract documents when dynamic sections appear or disappear based on form parameters. When null, the project inherits the organization/workspace default. Available styles: Normal (no numbering), Sequential (numbering from level 1), SequentialFromSecondLevel (numbering from level 2), SequentialWithParagraphs (numbering with symbol prefix like §).

projectDocumentEnableTocDefault.description: Default value for table of contents inherited from organization/workspace hierarchy. This is the value that will be used when projectDocumentEnableToc is null. Shows what the organization or workspace default is set to.

projectDocumentTitlePageDefault.description: Default value for title page inherited from organization/workspace hierarchy. This is the value that will be used when projectDocumentTitlePage is null. Shows what the organization or workspace default is set to.

projectDocumentDefaultContactUserIdDefau.description: Default contact person user ID inherited from organization hierarchy. This is the value that will be used when projectDocumentDefaultContactUserId is null. When null, there is no default contact person set at the organization/workspace level.

projectDocumentHeadingStyleDefault.description: Default heading style inherited from organization/workspace hierarchy. This is the value that will be used when projectDocumentHeadingStyle is null. Shows what the organization or workspace default heading style is set to.

projectDocumentEnableToc.description: Enable table of contents for project documents. Set to true to enable table of contents, false to disable, or null to inherit from organization/workspace default. This setting is especially helpful for long documents and makes them easier to navigate. All fields in this DTO are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

projectDocumentTitlePage.description: Enable title page for project documents. Set to true to enable title page, false to disable, or null to inherit from organization/workspace default. All fields in this DTO are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

projectDocumentDefaultContactUserId.description: Default contact person user ID for project documents. Set to a valid user UUID to automatically set this person as contact when creating new documents, or null to inherit from organization default (if set) or remove the default contact. Useful for recurring offer processes and automated preambles. Must be a valid UUID of a user in the workspace. All fields in this DTO are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

projectDocumentHeadingStyle.description: Heading style for project documents. Controls the numbering and formatting of headings in generated documents. Set to a specific style to override, or null to inherit from organization/workspace default. Available styles: Normal (no numbering), Sequential (numbering from level 1), SequentialFromSecondLevel (numbering from level 2), SequentialWithParagraphs (numbering with symbol prefix like §). This feature keeps document outlines consistent, especially in contract documents. All fields in this DTO are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription billing item. UUID format.

projectId.description: The project this subscription billing belongs to. UUID format.

fromDate.description: Start date of the subscription period. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). The subscription becomes active on this date.

toDate.description: End date of the subscription period. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). The subscription expires after this date. Must be equal to or after fromDate.

type.description: Type of subscription billing. "manual" indicates a manually created subscription (typical for API-created subscriptions). "product" indicates a subscription linked to a product catalog item.

payment.description: Payment calculation method for the subscription. "fixed" = fixed amount per billing period (e.g., $500/month). "perUnit" = variable pricing based on units (e.g., per user, per license). "oneTime" = one-time charge within the subscription period.

manualTitle.description: Human-readable title or description of the subscription. This appears on invoices and in project settings. Examples: "Monthly Support Package", "Quarterly Maintenance", "Annual License Renewal".

price.description: Price amount for the subscription. For fixed payment type, this is the amount per billing period. For perUnit payment type, this is the price per unit. For oneTime payment type, this is the total charge. Must be a positive number.

frequency.description: Billing frequency in months. Determines how often billing rows are generated. Common values: 1 = monthly billing, 3 = quarterly billing, 6 = semi-annual billing, 12 = yearly billing. Must be between 1 and 12.

sort.description: Display sort order for the subscription billing item. Lower numbers appear first. Used to control the order when multiple subscriptions are displayed. Automatically calculated when creating new items.

quantity.description: Quantity for variable pricing. Required when payment type is "oneTime". Used to calculate total charge (price × quantity). Optional for other payment types.

fromDate.description: Start date when the subscription becomes active. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). The system will generate billing rows starting from the beginning of this month. Required.

toDate.description: End date when the subscription expires. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). The system will generate billing rows up to the end of this month. Must be equal to or after fromDate. Required.

type.description: Type of subscription billing. Defaults to "manual" for API-created subscriptions. Use "product" only if linking to an existing product catalog item. Optional, defaults to manual.

payment.description: Payment calculation method. "fixed" = fixed amount per billing period (e.g., $500/month). "perUnit" = variable pricing based on units (e.g., $50 per user per month). "oneTime" = one-time charge (requires quantity field). Required.

manualTitle.description: Human-readable title or description that appears on invoices and in project settings. Examples: "Monthly Support Package", "Quarterly Maintenance Contract", "Annual License Renewal". Required.

price.description: Price amount. For "fixed" payment type: amount per billing period. For "perUnit" payment type: price per unit. For "oneTime" payment type: total charge amount. Must be a positive number. Required.

frequency.description: Billing frequency in months. Determines how often billing rows are generated within the date range. Common values: 1 = monthly, 3 = quarterly, 6 = semi-annual, 12 = yearly. Must be between 1 and 12. Required.

quantity.description: Quantity for variable pricing. Required when payment type is "oneTime" to calculate total charge (price × quantity). Optional for "fixed" and "perUnit" payment types.

fromDate.description: Start date when the subscription becomes active. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Updating this will regenerate billing rows. If both fromDate and toDate are provided, fromDate must be before or equal to toDate. Optional.

toDate.description: End date when the subscription expires. Format: ISO 8601 date string (YYYY-MM-DD). Updating this will regenerate billing rows. If both fromDate and toDate are provided, fromDate must be before or equal to toDate. Optional.

type.description: Type of subscription billing. "manual" for manually created subscriptions, "product" for subscriptions linked to product catalog items. Optional.

payment.description: Payment calculation method. "fixed" = fixed amount per billing period. "perUnit" = variable pricing based on units. "oneTime" = one-time charge (requires quantity). Optional.

manualTitle.description: Human-readable title or description that appears on invoices and in project settings. Examples: "Monthly Support Package", "Quarterly Maintenance". Optional.

price.description: Price amount. For "fixed": amount per billing period. For "perUnit": price per unit. For "oneTime": total charge amount. Must be positive if provided. Optional.

frequency.description: Billing frequency in months. Common values: 1 = monthly, 3 = quarterly, 6 = semi-annual, 12 = yearly. Updating this will regenerate billing rows. Must be between 1 and 12 if provided. Optional.

quantity.description: Quantity for variable pricing. Required when payment type is "oneTime" to calculate total charge (price × quantity). Optional for other payment types.

id.description: UUID of the product in the project

name.description: Product name as defined in the product

finalName.description: Final display name combining product name and active variant name (if a variant is active). If no variant is active, this matches the product name.

logoId.description: UUID of the logo file associated with this product. Null if no logo is set.

quantity.description: Number of units of this product in the project

finalPriceFixed.description: Final calculated fixed price including variant and option adjustments. This is the price that will be used for billing. Null if the product does not have fixed pricing.

finalPriceSubscription.description: Final calculated subscription price including variant and option adjustments. This is the recurring price per billing period. Null if the product does not have subscription pricing.

finalPricePerUnit.description: Final calculated per-unit price including variant and option adjustments. This is the price per unit (e.g., per user, per hour). Null if the product does not have per-unit pricing.

activeFrom.description: Start date when this product becomes active. Used for time-limited pricing versions. Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Null if no start date is set.

activeTo.description: End date when this product becomes inactive. Used for time-limited pricing versions. Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Null if no end date is set.

isActive.description: Whether the product is currently active based on the activeFrom and activeTo date range. True if current date is within the active range (or no dates are set).

id.description: UUID of the variant

name.description: Name of the variant (e.g., Standard, Pro, Enterprise)

description.description: Variant description formatted as HTML. Describes what makes this variant different from others.

priceFixed.description: One-time fixed price for this variant. Null if this variant does not have fixed pricing.

priceSubscription.description: Recurring subscription price per billing period for this variant. Null if this variant does not have subscription pricing.

pricePerUnit.description: Per-unit price for this variant. Null if this variant does not have per-unit pricing.

isActivated.description: Whether this variant is currently active for the product. Only one variant can be active at a time.

sort.description: Sort order of this variant. Lower values appear first when listing variants.

id.description: UUID of the option value

name.description: Name of the option value (e.g., Red, Blue, Large, Small)

extraPriceFixed.description: Additional fixed price added when this option value is selected. Null or 0 if no extra fixed cost.

extraPriceSubscription.description: Additional subscription price added per billing period when this option value is selected. Null or 0 if no extra subscription cost.

extraPricePerUnit.description: Additional per-unit price added when this option value is selected. Null or 0 if no extra per-unit cost.

isActivated.description: Whether this option value is currently selected/activated for the product

sort.description: Sort order of this option value. Lower values appear first when listing option values.

id.description: UUID of the option

name.description: Name of the option (e.g., Color, Size, Add-ons)

values.description: Array of all possible values for this option

isRequired.description: Whether this option must be selected when configuring the product

isMultiple.description: Whether multiple values can be selected from this option

sort.description: Sort order of this option. Lower values appear first when listing options.

id.description: UUID of the product in the project

name.description: Product name as defined in the product

description.description: Product description formatted as HTML. Converted from the internal document format.

logoId.description: UUID of the logo file associated with this product. Null if no logo is set.

quantity.description: Number of units of this product in the project

priceFixed.description: Base fixed price for the product before variant and option adjustments

priceSubscription.description: Base subscription price per billing period before variant and option adjustments

pricePerUnit.description: Base per-unit price before variant and option adjustments

priceUnitName.description: Unit name for per-unit pricing (e.g., per user, per hour)

priceFrequency.description: Billing frequency in months for subscription and per-unit pricing. Valid values: 1, 3, 6, or 12.

finalPriceFixed.description: Final calculated fixed price including variant and option adjustments. This is the price used for billing.

finalPriceSubscription.description: Final calculated subscription price including variant and option adjustments. This is the recurring price per billing period.

finalPricePerUnit.description: Final calculated per-unit price including variant and option adjustments

finalName.description: Final display name combining product name and active variant name (if a variant is active)

activeFrom.description: Start date when this product becomes active. Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Null if no start date is set.

activeTo.description: End date when this product becomes inactive. Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Null if no end date is set.

variants.description: Array of all available variants for this product

options.description: Array of all available options for this product

productId.description: UUID of the catalog product to import into the project. The product must exist in the product catalog. When imported, a copy is created in the project that can be configured independently.

quantity.description: Number of units of this product to add to the project. Must be at least 1. The quantity affects the final price calculation when using per-unit pricing.

activeVariantId.description: UUID of the variant to activate for this product instance. Variants represent different configurations or tiers of a product (e.g., Standard, Pro, Enterprise). If not provided, no variant is active. The variant must belong to the product being imported.

options.description: Array of option selections for this product. Options are add-ons or configuration choices that customers can select. Each option selection specifies which option is being configured and which values are selected. Required options must be included. Can be an empty array if no options are needed.

priceFrequency.description: Billing frequency in months for subscription or per-unit pricing. Valid values: 1 (monthly), 3 (quarterly), 6 (semi-annually), 12 (annually).

contractPeriodMonths.description: Contract period in months. Defaults to 12 months if not specified.

renewalMode.description: Renewal mode for the product subscription. Automatic means the subscription will automatically renew, Stops means it will stop at the end of the contract period.

activeFromType.description: Type of activation start for the product. Immediately means it starts right away, ProjectBilling means it starts with project billing, FixedDate means it starts on a specific date.

activeFromFixedDate.description: Fixed start date when activeFromType is FixedDate. Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required when activeFromType is FixedDate.

customPrices.description: Custom price overrides for base product, variants, and options. Keys can be "base", "variant_<variantId>", or "option_<optionValueId>". Each value contains priceFixed, priceSubscription, and pricePerUnit overrides. These prices are applied to the product when saving.

quantity.description: Number of units of this product in the project. Must be at least 1. This affects the final price calculation, especially for per-unit pricing.

activeVariantId.description: UUID of the variant to activate for this product. Variants represent different configurations or tiers (e.g., Standard, Pro, Enterprise). Set to null to deactivate any currently active variant. The variant must belong to this product.

options.description: Array of option selections for this product. Each selection specifies which option is being configured and which values are selected. Required options must be included. Provide an empty array if no options should be selected.

priceFrequency.description: Billing frequency in months for subscription or per-unit pricing. Valid values: 1 (monthly), 3 (quarterly), 6 (semi-annually), 12 (annually).

contractPeriodMonths.description: Contract period in months. Defaults to 12 months if not specified.

renewalMode.description: Renewal mode for the product subscription. Automatic means the subscription will automatically renew, Stops means it will stop at the end of the contract period.

activeFromType.description: Type of activation start for the product. Immediately means it starts right away, ProjectBilling means it starts with project billing, FixedDate means it starts on a specific date.

activeFromFixedDate.description: Fixed start date when activeFromType is FixedDate. Format: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). Required when activeFromType is FixedDate.

customPrices.description: Custom price overrides for base product, variants, and options. Keys can be "base", "variant_<variantId>", or "option_<optionValueId>". Each value contains priceFixed, priceSubscription, and pricePerUnit overrides. These prices are applied to the product when saving.

ids.description: Array of product UUIDs in the desired display order. The first UUID in the array will appear first in the product list, the second UUID will appear second, and so on. All product IDs must belong to the same project. Products not included in this array will retain their current sort order.

id.description: Unique identifier of the version (UUID)

title.description: Title/name of the version as provided when creating it

semverVersion.description: Semantic version string automatically generated based on parent version and branch. Follows semver-like format (e.g., "1.2.3")

branchId.description: Branch identifier (UUID) for version tracking. Used to group related versions together and enable branching/versioning workflows

parentId.description: Parent version ID (UUID). Null if this is the first version created for the project. Used to track version lineage and generate semantic version numbers

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the version was created

createdBy.description: User ID (UUID) who created the version

description.description: HTML-formatted description of the version. Originally provided as HTML or Markdown when creating the version, always returned as HTML

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current active version for the project. Only one version can be current at a time. The current version represents the active project state

id.description: Unique identifier of the version (UUID)

title.description: Title/name of the version as provided when creating it

semverVersion.description: Semantic version string automatically generated based on parent version and branch. Follows semver-like format (e.g., "1.2.3")

branchId.description: Branch identifier (UUID) for version tracking. Used to group related versions together and enable branching/versioning workflows

parentId.description: Parent version ID (UUID). Null if this is the first version created for the project. Used to track version lineage and generate semantic version numbers

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the version was created

createdBy.description: User ID (UUID) who created the version

description.description: HTML-formatted description of the version. Originally provided as HTML or Markdown when creating the version, always returned as HTML

isCurrent.description: Whether this is the current active version for the project. Only one version can be current at a time. The current version represents the active project state

estimateData.description: Complete estimate data captured at the time the version was created. Includes products with variants and prices, components with nested structure, manual positions, and pricing breakdowns (fixed, subscriptions, per-unit). This data represents the exact project state when the version was saved.

projectId.description: UUID of the project to create a version for

title.description: Title/name of the version. Use clear, descriptive titles like "Version 1.2.3 - Initial Release" or "Customer Proposal v2"

description.description: Description of the version in HTML or Markdown format (optional). This can include notes about what changed, why the version was created, or any relevant context.

projectId.description: Project UUID

lastConfigurationSnapshot.description: Information about the last saved version (snapshot). Null if no versions have been created yet. Contains the version ID, semantic version string, creation timestamp, and title.

id.description: Version ID (UUID)

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when version was created

title.description: Version title

configurationChanged.description: Whether the project configuration has changed since the last version was saved. True means there are unsaved changes that should be versioned before proceeding with offers or documents.

configurationChangedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the configuration last changed. Null if configuration has not changed since the last version was saved.

productCount.description: Number of products currently in the project

componentCount.description: Number of components currently in the project

manualPositionCount.description: Number of manual positions currently in the project

discountCount.description: Number of discounts currently applied to the project

snapshotCount.description: Total number of versions (snapshots) saved for the project

documentCount.description: Number of documents associated with the project

id.description: Project category ID

name.description: Project category name

icon.description: Icon identifier in the format `:icon_name:` (e.g., `:rocket:`, `:wrench:`, `:briefcase:`)

description.description: Category description

translations.description: Translations

id.description: Project status ID

name.description: Project status name

icon.description: Icon identifier in the format `:icon_name:` (e.g., `:hourglass_flowing_sand:`, `:check_mark:`, `:moneybag:`)

description.description: Status description

type.description: Project status type

translations.description: Translations

id.description: Project phase ID

name.description: Project phase name

icon.description: Icon identifier in the format `:icon_name:` (e.g., `:calendar:`, `:phone:`, `:trophy:`)

description.description: Phase description

type.description: Project phase type

translations.description: Translations

id.description: Project ID

name.description: Project name

type.description: Project type

description.description: Project description (HTML)

icon.description: Icon/emoji

defaultAccountableId.description: ID of the default accountable user

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp

users.description: Array of user IDs assigned to the project

teams.description: Array of team IDs assigned to the project

taskTypes.description: Array of task type IDs enabled for the project

activities.description: Array of time activity IDs enabled for the project

color.description: Project color (from organization or workspace default)

isFavorite.description: Whether the project is marked as favorite by the current user

name.description: Full name of the project. This is the primary display name used throughout the application.

type.description: Project type determines the project structure and workflow. Single projects are one-off initiatives with defined start and finish, usually planned and billed as quoted. Ongoing projects are continuous activities where tasks are handled and billed based on effort.

valueGroup.description: Value group classification indicates how the project contributes to value creation. A - Direct value creation (external customer projects), B - Indirect value creation (internal projects that increase product/service value), C - Not value creating (administrative tasks), D - Waste (unproductive time).

categoryId.description: UUID of the project category. Categories classify projects by functional area or project type (e.g., Onboarding, Support, Implementation). Use the GET /projects/categories endpoint to retrieve available categories.

statusId.description: UUID of the project status. Statuses represent the current progress stage of a project (e.g., Sales, Implementation, Billing, Done). Use the GET /projects/statuses endpoint to retrieve available statuses.

phaseId.description: UUID of the project phase. Phases represent distinct stages within a project lifecycle (e.g., Planning, Development, Testing). Required for external single projects, optional otherwise. Use the GET /projects/phases endpoint to retrieve available phases.

organizationId.description: UUID of the organization (client). Required for external projects - must be set to link the project to a client organization. Must be null for internal projects. Use the GET /organizations endpoint to retrieve available organizations.

description.description:
Accepts markdown or HTML for complex formatting. In HTML you can use: ## Node Types and Marks ### Nodes **paragraph** Type: block Content: inline* Atts: - extraPlaceholder: null ```html

``` **heading** Type: block Content: inline* Atts: - level: 1 ```html

``` **bulletList** Type: block list Content: listItem+ Atts: none ```html
``` **hardBreak** Type: inline Atts: none ```html
``` **horizontalRule** Type: block Atts: none ```html
``` **orderedList** Type: block list Content: listItem+ Atts: - start: 1 - type: null ```html
``` **listItem** Content: (paragraph|list)* Atts: none ```html
  • ``` **blockquote** Type: block Content: block+ Atts: none ```html

    ``` ### Marks **link** Atts: - href: null - target: _blank - rel: noopener noreferrer nofollow - class: null ```html link text example ``` **bold** Atts: none ```html bold text example ``` **code** Atts: none ```html code text example ``` **italic** Atts: none ```html italic text example ``` **strike** Atts: none ```html strike text example ``` **underline** Atts: none ```html underline text example ``` The description will be automatically converted from HTML/Markdown to the internal IDoc format. When retrieved later via GET, it will be returned as HTML.
description.example:
Project Description

This is a comprehensive project for redesigning our company website.

icon.description: Visual identifier for the project. Must be in the format `:icon_name:` (e.g., `:rocket:`, `:shopping_cart:`, `:mobile_phone:`). This icon is displayed in project lists and throughout the application. You can use standard emoji short names (e.g., `:rocket:` for 🚀, `:shopping_cart:` for 🛒) or custom icon names created in the workspace.

guestAccess.description: Whether organization members (guests) can access this project. Only applicable for external (client) projects. When enabled, members of the linked organization can view and interact with the project and its tasks.

deadline.description: Project deadline date in ISO 8601 format (e.g., "2024-12-31T23:59:59.000Z"). Optional target completion date for the project.

defaultAccountableId.description: UUID of the user who is accountable for the project by default. This user will be set as accountable on new tasks created in this project unless overridden. Use the GET /workspace/users endpoint to retrieve available users.

responsibleId.description: UUID of the user who is responsible for the project (e.g., project manager, sales manager). Use the GET /workspace/users endpoint to retrieve available users.

users.description: Array of user UUIDs who have access to this project. These users can create, edit, and log time on tasks in the project. At least one user must be assigned. Use the GET /workspace/users endpoint to retrieve available users.

teams.description: Array of team UUIDs assigned to the project. All members of these teams will have access to the project. Use the GET /teams endpoint to retrieve available teams.

taskTypes.description: Array of task type UUIDs that can be used in this project (e.g., Feature, Bug, Management, Server issue). At least one task type must be specified. Use the GET /task-types endpoint to retrieve available task types.

activities.description: Array of time activity UUIDs that can be used when logging time in this project (e.g., Development, Testing, Management, Research). At least one activity must be specified. Use the GET /activities endpoint to retrieve available activities.

customFields.description: Custom field values as key-value pairs. Keys should match custom field IDs configured in workspace settings. Values must match the field type (string, number, boolean, date, etc.). Use the GET /custom-fields endpoint to retrieve available custom fields and their configurations.

tags.description: Array of tag strings for categorizing and filtering projects. Tags can represent topics, teams, or work types. Tags make it easier to filter and organize projects in the project overview.

name.description: Name of the project

type.description: Project type - determines if project is internal or client-facing

valueGroup.description: Value group classification for the project

organizationId.description: ID of the organization (required for client projects, must be null for internal projects)

description.example:
Updated Description

This is the updated project description.

icon.description: Icon/emoji for the project

guestAccess.description: Whether guest access is enabled (only applicable for client projects)

defaultAccountableId.description: ID of the default accountable user

users.description: Array of user IDs assigned to the project

teams.description: Array of team IDs assigned to the project

taskTypes.description: Array of task type IDs enabled for the project

activities.description: Array of time activity IDs enabled for the project

enableExpressQuotations.description: Whether express quotations are enabled for this project. Express quotations allow quick pricing of tasks without full project planning. Only applicable for external projects.

id.description: Unique identifier for the support contingent (UUID)

projectId.description: ID of the project this contingent belongs to (UUID)

title.description: Title or name of the support contingent plan

fromDate.description: Start date of the contingent period (ISO 8601 date format)

toDate.description: End date of the contingent period (ISO 8601 date format). If not set, the contingent is active forever.

frequency.description: Frequency in months for the contingent period

hours.description: Total hours allocated for the contingent period

transferable.description: Whether unused hours can be transferred to the next period

isActive.description: Whether the contingent is currently active (today is within fromDate and toDate)

availableHours.description: Available hours for the current period (calculated based on transferable logic and consumed hours)

consumedHours.description: Consumed hours in the current period (from invoices)

potentiallyUsedByTasks.description: Hours that will be potentially used by unbilled tasks (calculated based on task assignment logic)

availableByContract.description: Available hours from the current period contract (baseHours - consumed in current period)

transferableFromPrevious.description: Transferable hours from previous periods (only applicable for transferable contingents)

currentPeriodStart.description: Start date of the current period (ISO 8601 date format)

currentPeriodEnd.description: End date of the current period (ISO 8601 date format)

currentPeriodHasNoEndDate.description: Flag indicating if the current period has no end date (for frequency=0 contingents with null toDate). When true, currentPeriodEnd represents the current date for display purposes, but the period is actually open-ended.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the contingent was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the contingent was last updated

id.description: Unique identifier for the task (UUID)

title.description: Title of the task

invoiceNumber.description: Invoice number if the task is billed, null if unbilled

isUnbilled.description: Flag indicating if this task is unbilled (in progress)

periodStart.description: Start date of the period (ISO 8601 date format)

periodEnd.description: End date of the period (ISO 8601 date format)

hoursFromPrevious.description: Hours transferred from previous period (only applicable for transferable contingents)

consumedHours.description: Hours consumed in this period (from invoices)

isCurrentPeriod.description: Flag indicating if this is the current active period

hasNoEndDate.description: Flag indicating if this period has no end date (for frequency=0 contingents with null toDate). When true, periodEnd represents the current date for display purposes, but the period is actually open-ended.

tasks.description: List of tasks billed or unbilled in this period

id.description: Unique identifier for the support contingent (UUID)

projectId.description: ID of the project this contingent belongs to (UUID)

title.description: Title or name of the support contingent plan

fromDate.description: Start date of the contingent period (ISO 8601 date format)

toDate.description: End date of the contingent period (ISO 8601 date format). If not set, the contingent is active forever.

frequency.description: Frequency in months for the contingent period

price.description: Total price for the contingent period

hours.description: Total hours allocated for the contingent period

rate.description: Calculated hourly rate (price / hours). Automatically computed.

transferable.description: Whether unused hours can be transferred to the next period

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the contingent was created

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the contingent was last updated

periods.description: Period-by-period breakdown of the contingent, from start until present day

id.description: Workspace ID

documentFont.description: Font family used for all documents generated by Leadtime. Available options: Inter (default), Degular, Roboto, Arimo, Open Sans, PT Sans, Oswald, EB Garamond, Permanent Marker, IBM Plex Mono.

documentLogoUrl.description: Public URL to the workspace logo image. This logo appears on all generated documents. If null, the Leadtime logo is used by default. The URL is publicly accessible without authentication.

projectDocumentEnableToc.description: Whether to automatically include a table of contents at the beginning of project documents (quotes, specifications, etc.). When enabled, a TOC is generated based on document headings.

projectDocumentTitlePage.description: Whether to automatically include a title page in project documents. When enabled, a cover page is added as the first page with project and organization information.

projectDocumentHeadingStyle.description: Controls how headings are numbered and formatted in project documents. Options: `Normal` (no numbering), `Sequential` (1., 1.1., 1.1.1.), `SequentialFromSecondLevel` (top heading unnumbered), `SequentialWithParagraphs` (§ 1., § 1.1. - ideal for contracts).

specificationBackgroundUrl.description: Public URL to the background image used on specification document cover pages. Recommended size: 820 × 600 pixels. Formats: PNG, JPG, or SVG. The URL is publicly accessible without authentication.

estimateBackgroundUrl.description: Public URL to the background image used on estimate/proposal document cover pages. Recommended size: 820 × 600 pixels. Formats: PNG, JPG, or SVG. The URL is publicly accessible without authentication.

customEditorBackgroundUrl.description: Public URL to the background image used on custom editor document cover pages (documents created with the template system). Recommended size: 820 × 600 pixels. Formats: PNG, JPG, or SVG. The URL is publicly accessible without authentication.

documentLanguage.description: Default language code for project documents (e.g., "en", "de"). Used when document language is not specified.

offerTexts.description: Array of language-specific default offer texts. Each entry contains a language code and default intro/outro texts (returned as HTML).

documentFont.description: Font family to use for all documents. Must be one of: Inter, Degular, Roboto, Arimo, Open Sans, PT Sans, Oswald, EB Garamond, Permanent Marker, IBM Plex Mono. If not provided, current value is preserved.

documentLogoId.description: UUID of the logo image file uploaded via POST /api/public/workspace/upload. This logo appears on all generated documents. Set to `null` to remove the logo (defaults to Leadtime logo). If not provided, current value is preserved.

projectDocumentEnableToc.description: Whether to automatically include a table of contents in project documents. When enabled, a TOC is generated based on document headings. If not provided, current value is preserved.

projectDocumentTitlePage.description: Whether to automatically include a title page in project documents. When enabled, a cover page is added as the first page. If not provided, current value is preserved.

projectDocumentHeadingStyle.description: Heading numbering style for project documents. Options: `Normal` (no numbering), `Sequential` (1., 1.1., 1.1.1.), `SequentialFromSecondLevel` (top heading unnumbered), `SequentialWithParagraphs` (§ 1., § 1.1.). If not provided, current value is preserved.

specificationBackgroundId.description: UUID of the specification background image file uploaded via POST /api/public/workspace/upload. Used on specification document cover pages. Recommended size: 820 × 600 pixels. Set to `null` to remove. If not provided, current value is preserved.

estimateBackgroundId.description: UUID of the estimate/proposal background image file uploaded via POST /api/public/workspace/upload. Used on estimate document cover pages. Recommended size: 820 × 600 pixels. Set to `null` to remove. If not provided, current value is preserved.

customEditorBackgroundId.description: UUID of the custom editor background image file uploaded via POST /api/public/workspace/upload. Used on template-based document cover pages. Recommended size: 820 × 600 pixels. Set to `null` to remove. If not provided, current value is preserved.

documentLanguage.description: Default language code for project documents. Must be one of: en, de. If not provided, current value is preserved.

offerTexts.description: Array of language-specific offer texts. Each entry must include a language code and intro/outro texts (HTML or Markdown). If not provided, current values are preserved.

id.description: Unique identifier for the estimate. UUID format.

type.description: Type of estimate. PROJECT_DOCUMENT for detailed project estimates, EXPRESS_QUOTATION for quick ticket-based estimates.

title.description: Human-readable title of the estimate. Used for quick search and display purposes.

organizationId.description: Unique identifier of the organization (customer) this estimate belongs to. UUID format.

organizationName.description: Display name of the organization. Provided for convenience to avoid additional lookups.

projectId.description: Unique identifier of the project this estimate is linked to. UUID format. Required for both estimate types.

projectName.description: Display name of the project. Provided for convenience to avoid additional lookups.

taskId.description: Unique identifier of the task (ticket) this express quotation is linked to. Only present for EXPRESS_QUOTATION type estimates. UUID format.

taskShortNumber.description: Short numeric identifier of the task. Only present for EXPRESS_QUOTATION type estimates. Used for display purposes (e.g., "Task #42").

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the estimate was created. Format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ

status.description: Current status of the estimate. Indicates where the estimate is in the sales process: Draft (being prepared), WaitingForApproval (pending internal approval), Final (approved), Pending (sent to customer), Accepted (customer accepted), Rejected (customer rejected), or Parked (temporarily set aside).

total.description: Total price for express quotations. This is the sum of all price components (fixed + subscriptions + per-unit). Only present for EXPRESS_QUOTATION type estimates.

priceFixed.description: Fixed price component representing one-time charges for services or products. This is a single payment amount, not recurring.

priceSubscriptions.description: Subscription price component representing recurring charges (monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, or annually). The total of all subscription items in the estimate.

pricePerUnit.description: Per-unit price component representing charges based on quantity (e.g., price per user license, price per workspace, price per API call). The total of all per-unit items in the estimate.

priceSubscriptionsDetail.description: Detailed breakdown of subscription prices by product or service name. Key-value pairs where keys are product/service names and values are their subscription prices. Useful for understanding which items contribute to the total subscription price. Null if no subscription items exist.

pricePerUnitDetail.description: Detailed breakdown of per-unit prices by product or service name. Key-value pairs where keys are product/service names and values are their per-unit prices. Useful for understanding which items contribute to the total per-unit price. Null if no per-unit items exist.

createdById.description: Unique identifier of the user who created this estimate. UUID format.

createdByName.description: Full name of the user who created this estimate. Provided for convenience to avoid additional user lookups.

items.description: Array of estimate items matching the query parameters. Each item represents either a project document estimate or an express quotation.

total.description: Total number of estimate items matching the query filters across all pages. Use this value to calculate total pages: Math.ceil(total / pageSize).

page.description: Current page number (1-based). Used for pagination navigation.

pageSize.description: Number of items returned per page. Determines how many estimate items are included in the items array.

totalPriceFixed.description: Aggregated sum of all fixed price components across all filtered estimate items. This represents the total one-time revenue potential from fixed-price items. Calculated by summing priceFixed from all items in the filtered result set.

totalPriceSubscriptions.description: Aggregated sum of all subscription price components across all filtered estimate items. This represents the total recurring revenue potential from subscription items. Calculated by summing priceSubscriptions from all items in the filtered result set.

totalPricePerUnit.description: Aggregated sum of all per-unit price components across all filtered estimate items. This represents the total revenue potential from per-unit items. Calculated by summing pricePerUnit from all items in the filtered result set.

featureCode.description: Feature code identifier. Identifies which workspace feature this information applies to (e.g., customFields, advancedReports, apiAccess).

label.description: Human-readable display label for the feature. Localized based on workspace language settings.

enabled.description: Whether this feature is currently enabled and active for the workspace. Disabled features are not available for use.

monthlyPrice.description: Monthly subscription price for this feature in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. Null if feature is not available on monthly billing.

yearlyPrice.description: Yearly subscription price for this feature in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. Null if feature is not available on yearly billing.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All prices are in this currency.

description.description: Optional description explaining what this feature provides and how it benefits the workspace.

productName.description: Product name from Stripe. Identifies what is being billed (e.g., "Leadtime Pro Plan", "Additional Seats").

quantity.description: Quantity of this item in the subscription. For seat-based billing, this represents the number of seats.

unitAmount.description: Price per unit in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. This is the price for a single unit before quantity multiplication.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All amounts for this item are in this currency.

interval.description: Billing interval for this item. Values: "month" for monthly billing, "year" for yearly billing. Null if not applicable.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for this line item in cents (unitAmount × quantity). Multiply by 100 to get the display amount.

status.description: Current subscription status from Stripe. Common values: "active" (subscription is active and paid), "trialing" (in trial period), "past_due" (payment failed), "canceled" (subscription canceled), "unpaid" (payment required).

currentPeriodStart.description: Start date of the current billing period. ISO 8601 format. This is when the current billing cycle began.

currentPeriodEnd.description: End date of the current billing period. ISO 8601 format. This is when the current billing cycle ends and the next invoice will be generated.

items.description: List of all items included in this subscription. Each item represents a product or service being billed (e.g., base plan, additional seats, add-ons).

dashboardUrl.description: Direct URL to view and manage this subscription in the Stripe dashboard. Opens in a new window/tab. Only available for enterprise workspaces.

description.description: Human-readable description of the tax. Typically includes the tax type and jurisdiction (e.g., "VAT", "Sales Tax", "GST").

amount.description: Tax amount in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. This is the total tax for this specific tax line.

percentage.description: Tax rate percentage (e.g., 19.0 for 19% VAT). Optional - may not be available for all tax types.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this line item represents. Examples: "Leadtime Pro Plan - Monthly", "Additional Seats (5)", "Setup Fee".

quantity.description: Quantity of this item. For seat-based billing, this represents the number of seats. For fixed-price items, typically 1.

unitAmount.description: Price per unit in cents before quantity multiplication. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. Null if this is a fixed total amount line item.

totalAmount.description: Total amount for this line item in cents (unitAmount × quantity, including any discounts). Multiply by 100 to get the display amount.

amountExcludingTax.description: Total amount excluding tax in cents. Only present if tax is applied. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount.

taxes.description: Tax information specific to this line item. Multiple tax rates may apply to a single line item in some jurisdictions.

displayName.description: Human-readable name for this tax rate. Examples: "VAT", "Sales Tax", "GST".

percentage.description: Tax rate as a percentage. Example: 19.0 represents 19% tax. Used to calculate tax amounts.

description.description: Human-readable description of the tax line. Typically includes tax type and jurisdiction.

amount.description: Total tax amount for this tax line in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. This is the sum of all taxes at this rate.

rate.description: Detailed tax rate information including display name and percentage. Optional - may not be available for all tax types.

periodStart.description: Start date of the billing period this invoice covers. ISO 8601 format. Null if period information is not available.

periodEnd.description: End date of the billing period this invoice covers. ISO 8601 format. Null if period information is not available.

dueDate.description: Date when payment is due for this invoice. ISO 8601 format. Null if due date is not yet determined.

lines.description: All line items that will appear on the upcoming invoice. Includes base plan, seats, add-ons, and any other charges.

subtotal.description: Subtotal amount in cents before taxes and discounts. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. Sum of all line item totals.

subtotal_excluding_tax.description: Subtotal excluding tax in cents. Only present if tax is applied. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount.

taxLines.description: All tax lines that will appear on the invoice. Each line represents a different tax rate or tax type.

tax.description: Total tax amount in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. Sum of all tax line amounts.

total.description: Final total amount due in cents including all line items and taxes. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. This is the amount that will be charged.

total_excluding_tax.description: Total amount excluding tax in cents. Only present if tax is applied. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All amounts are in this currency.

id.description: Unique Stripe invoice identifier. Use this to reference the invoice in Stripe API calls or support requests.

number.description: Human-readable invoice number. This is the invoice number displayed to customers and used for accounting purposes.

status.description: Current status of the invoice. Common values: "paid" (successfully paid), "open" (awaiting payment), "void" (canceled), "uncollectible" (payment failed).

amount.description: Total amount due for this invoice in cents. Multiply by 100 to get the display amount. This is the amount that was or will be charged.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP). All amounts for this invoice are in this currency.

created.description: Date and time when the invoice was created. ISO 8601 format.

dueDate.description: Date when payment was or is due for this invoice. ISO 8601 format. Null if due date is not applicable.

paidAt.description: Date and time when the invoice was successfully paid. ISO 8601 format. Null if invoice is not yet paid or payment failed.

viewUrl.description: Direct URL to view this invoice in Stripe customer portal. Opens the invoice in a web browser. Use this to allow customers to view or download their invoices.

billingMode.description: Workspace billing tier. Values: "free" (no paid subscription), "regular" (standard paid subscription), "enterprise" (custom enterprise agreement). Determines what features and billing details are available.

billingStatus.description: Current subscription status. Values: "active" (subscription is active and paid), "trialing" (in trial period), "past_due" (payment failed), "canceled" (subscription canceled), "unpaid" (payment required). Only present for paid workspaces.

planCode.description: Specific plan identifier. Identifies which subscription plan the workspace is on (e.g., "pro", "team", "enterprise"). Only present for paid workspaces.

billingInterval.description: Billing frequency. Values: "monthly" (billed every month), "yearly" (billed annually with potential discount). Only present for paid workspaces.

features.description: List of workspace features currently enabled. Each feature code represents a capability or add-on that is active (e.g., customFields, advancedReports, apiAccess). Empty array for free workspaces.

featuresInfo.description: Detailed information about each enabled feature including pricing, labels, and descriptions. Useful for displaying feature lists with pricing in subscription management interfaces. Only present for paid workspaces.

stripeCustomerId.description: Stripe customer identifier. Used to reference this workspace in Stripe API calls. Null for free workspaces or if Stripe integration is not set up.

stripeSubscriptionId.description: Stripe subscription identifier. Used to reference the active subscription in Stripe API calls. Null for free workspaces or if no active subscription exists.

trialEnd.description: End date of the trial period. ISO 8601 format. Null if workspace is not in trial or trial has ended. After this date, subscription will convert to paid or cancel.

subscriptionDetails.description: Detailed subscription information from Stripe including status, billing period, and subscription items. Only available for enterprise workspaces with active Stripe subscriptions. Null for free or regular workspaces.

nextInvoice.description: Preview of the upcoming invoice that will be generated at the next billing cycle. Includes line items, taxes, and totals. Only available for paid workspaces with active subscriptions. Null for free workspaces or if preview cannot be generated.

latestInvoices.description: List of up to 5 most recent invoices. Includes invoice numbers, amounts, payment status, and direct links to view invoices. Only available for paid workspaces. Empty array for free workspaces or trial workspaces without payment history.

billableUsersCount.description: Current number of billable users in the workspace. This is the count of users who are counted toward seat-based billing. Only present for paid workspaces.

committedSeats.description: Number of seats currently committed and being billed for. This is the base seat count in the subscription. Only present for paid workspaces.

pendingSeats.description: Number of additional seats scheduled to be added in the next billing period. Null if no seat changes are pending. Only present for paid workspaces.

pendingEffectiveAt.description: Date when pending seat changes become effective. ISO 8601 format. Null if no seat changes are pending. Only present for paid workspaces.

cancelAtPeriodEnd.description: Whether the subscription is scheduled to cancel at the end of the current billing period. True means subscription will cancel automatically, false means it will renew. Null if cancellation status is unknown.

cancellationEffectiveAt.description: Date when the subscription cancellation becomes effective. ISO 8601 format. This is typically the end of the current billing period. Null if subscription is not scheduled to cancel.

cancellationRequestedAt.description: Date when the cancellation was requested by the user. ISO 8601 format. Null if cancellation has not been requested.

cancellationReason.description: Reason provided by the user when requesting cancellation. May include feedback about why they are canceling. Null if no reason was provided or cancellation was not user-initiated.

nextBillingInterval.description: Billing interval that will take effect in the next billing cycle. Values: "monthly" or "yearly". Null if no interval change is scheduled. Only present when user has requested to switch between monthly and yearly billing.

stillAvailableFeatures.description: List of features that will remain available after a billing interval change. Some features may be restricted when switching from yearly to monthly billing. Empty array if no interval change is scheduled or all features remain available.

billingIntervalChangeScheduled.description: Date when a scheduled billing interval change will take effect. ISO 8601 format. Null if no interval change is scheduled.

hasPaymentMethod.description: Whether the workspace has a valid payment method on file with Stripe. True means payment can be processed automatically, false means payment method needs to be added. Only present for paid workspaces.

potentialInvoiceId.description: Potential invoice identifier in the format: `{type}::{projectId}::{dateFrom}::{dateTo}`. The type can be one of: Mixed, Subscription, TimeBased, ExpressQuotation, SingleProject, InterimPayment. Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format. Example: `SingleProject::0e9d033a-ab41-4212-8637-66c4e3b01fe2::2025-10-01::2025-10-31`. To get available potential invoices, use the GET /billing/potential-invoices endpoint.

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID) of the created invoice

number.description: Invoice number in the format: `{ORG}{PRJ}-{YY}{MM}-{NNN}`. This is the official sequential invoice number used for accounting and customer communication.

id.description: Contact ID (UUID) of the organization member. Use this ID when setting the contactId for a potential invoice via the PATCH endpoint.

name.description: Full name of the contact (organization member). This is the person who will receive the invoice when it is sent via email.

avatarId.description: Avatar file ID (UUID) if the contact has a profile picture. Null if no avatar is set.

email.description: Email address of the contact. This is where the invoice will be sent when finalized. Null if the contact does not have an email address.

id.description: Invoice support contingent charge ID

supportContingentId.description: Support contingent ID (UUID) that this charge is based on

title.description: Title of the support contingent

periodStart.description: Billing period start date (ISO 8601 date string, YYYY-MM-DD format)

periodEnd.description: Billing period end date (ISO 8601 date string, YYYY-MM-DD format)

frequency.description: Billing frequency in months. Determines how often this contingent is charged (e.g., 1 = monthly, 3 = quarterly)

hoursIncluded.description: Number of hours included in this billing period

price.description: Total price for this billing period (in organization currency)

hourRate.description: Hourly rate used for calculating the price (in organization currency)

transferable.description: Whether unused hours from this period can be transferred to future periods

id.description: Invoice ID (UUID)

type.description: Invoice type

projectId.description: Project ID

createdAt.description: Invoice creation date

sentBy.description: User ID who sent the invoice

sentToContactId.description: Contact ID who received the invoice

firstReminderSentBy.description: User ID who sent first reminder

secondReminderSentBy.description: User ID who sent second reminder

hourRate.description: Hourly rate used for time-based billing

supportContingentCharges.description: Support contingent charges billed on this invoice

supportContingentChargesCount.description: Number of support contingent charges billed

supportContingentChargesSum.description: Total amount from support contingent charges

leadtimeRowCustomTitle.description: Custom title for Leadtime fee row

id.description: Invoice ID (UUID) to update the contact for

contactId.description: Contact ID (UUID) of the organization member who should receive the invoice. This must be a valid contact from the project's customer organization. Set to null to clear the contact. Use GET /billing/invoiceContacts/{projectId} to get available contacts.

id.description: Invoice ID (UUID) to send. The invoice must have a contact with a valid email address set. The invoice will be sent via email as a PDF attachment.
